publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-12-21 00:12:12 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Ephemera, posters, printed material, toys, dishes, textiles, and buttons.
did.abstract: The collection consists of approximately 3,912 items, including buttons, ribbons, posters, bumper stickers, pamphlets, flyers, and other ephemera, and 3-dimensional items such as glassware, soap, cigars, clocks, figurines, toys, and more. Politcal items include all the major presidental candiates from the 1960s through the 2016 election as well as many smaller state and local campaigns, mainly from New York State.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Robert (Bob) D. Schultz received is BA (1977) and his MBA (1978) from Cornell University. He spent 25 years collecting political campaign memorabilia, primarily from the early 1960s onward. He donated his collection to Cornell University Library in 2016.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: The collection consists of approximately 3,912 items, including buttons, ribbons, posters, bumper stickers, pamphlets, flyers, and other ephemera, and 3-dimensional items such as glassware, soap, cigars, clocks, figurines, toys, and more. Politcal items include all the major presidental candiates from the 1960s through the 2016 election as well as many smaller state and local campaigns, mainly from New York State.

emph.ref: Series I. Toys and other large election ephemera
Series IV. Oversized posters and flyers

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Bob Shultz Political Americana collection, #8566. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Toys and other large election ephemera
Toys - George W. Bush, John Kerry, Hilary and Bill Clinton
Toy and dolls from various elections
Dolls and collectibles related to Saddam Hussein, George Bush and Bill Clinton
Hats, glasses, pillow from various elections
Toys - George W. Bush, John Kerry, Hillary and Bill Clinton
Slippers - Reagan and George H.W. Bush
Toys - Regan, George H. W. Bush, and Bill Clinton
Masks - Carter, Reagan, George W. Bush, and Bill Clinton
Glasses, plates and other fragile items
Various items relating to Bill Clinton, Al Gore, George H.W. Bush and the 200th anniversary of the White House
Various items relating to Jimmy Carter
Various items relating to George W. Bush, Kerry, and McCain
Various items relating to Romney and Obama
Hats, food packaging, and other small items from various elections

physdesc.dimensions: Includes some items from other elections.

did.unittitle: Matchbooks, tin plates and a Nixon shower head.
911 Material, toys, Russian nesting dolls, hats, Clinton memorabilia
Uptown Bill Clinton doll playing saxophone
Presidents of the United States figurines
Pins and buttons - New York and other state and local elections
Pins and buttons: Taft through Bill Clinton
Presidential: F.D. Roosevelt through Ralph Nader

physdesc.dimensions: Includes stickers and some campaign give aways such as pens and matchbooks

did.unittitle: Presidential: John Kerry through Ben Carson

physdesc.dimensions: Includes stickers and some campaign give aways such as pens and matchbooks

did.unittitle: Presidential: John F. Kennedy through 2016 candidates

physdesc.dimensions: Includes legal sized materials.

did.unittitle: First in the National Presidential Town Hall
New York and other state and local elections

physdesc.dimensions: Includes state elections for individuals who would go on to be president such as John F. Kennedy and George W. Bush

did.unittitle: New York and other state and local elections

physdesc.dimensions: Includes some republican committee items, drug prevention and Y2K material

did.unittitle: The Statue of Liberty - Ellis Islan Restoration Ad Council
Bicentennial of the Constitution Ad Council

physdesc.dimensions: Mainly related to Bill and Hilary Clinton.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Surrender of Japan, Moon Landing, Saddam Hussein, JFK, Clintons, Ossama Bin Laden, 911, Trump

did.unittitle: Shopping bags and other giveaway bags

physdesc.dimensions: Mainly paper, some fabric or plastic.

did.unittitle: John F. Kennedy, Robert Kennedy, Eisenhower

physdesc.dimensions: Extra large poster
This Gore material is from when he ran for president in 1988

did.unittitle: George H.W. Bush, Perot, Bill Clinton, and Bob Dole
Clinton, George H.W. Bush, and Perot

physdesc.dimensions: Standing posters with removable numbers

did.unittitle: Dodd, Thompson, Giuliani, McCain, Santorum, Obama, Hillary Clinton, Edwards, Kerry
Nixon, John F. Kennedy, Robert Kennedy, Carter, and Reagan

physdesc.dimensions: Includes Edward Kennedy, Wallace, Goldwater, Reagan, Rockefeller, Javits
Includes Moynihan, Ottinger, Goldberg, Tip O'Neill
Includes Edward Kennedy
Includes George W. Bush, D'Amato, Dodd, Moynihan, Pataki, Cuomo
Includes Cuomo, Spitzer, Hillary Clinton, Lazio

It Takes a Village by Antonio

physdesc.dimensions: Book on CD read by Bill Clinton

John F. Kennedy - The Presidential Years 1960-1963

physdesc.dimensions: Recordings of speeches given by Kennedy during his presidency

physdesc.dimensions: Comedic recording.
